name: Dinomon

signature_move.name: Burning End
signature_move.description: Reduces the enemy to ash with its flaming claws.

description: Dinomon is a pinnacle that Dinosaur Digimon finally reach after long battles. An Ultimate Digimon that has awakened an ancient power, its tremendous energy appears as a glow on the surface of its body. Boasting astounding stamina and power, it tramples down the enemy with overwhelming force. As the battle heats up, the black scales that cover Dinomon turn red due to the heat, and it is able to use the energy within its body to attack more efficiently. It is said that when Dinomon fights in earnest, the entire area will be transformed into a wasteland with nothing but ash and lava. Also, after battle, it has a habit of submerging into the sea in order to cool down its overheated body. Since a large amount of steam rises up as it cools off, the surrounding Digimon see this and realize that Dinomon has fought fiercely and become victorious. However, its fighting spirit will never let it exhibit its immense power violently. The reason why Dinomon is feared is that it strategically corners the enemy with its composure, backed up by its high intelligence. Its Special Move is reducing the enemy to ash with its flame-laden claws ( Burning End ). Its " Dino Breath " is an ultra-high temperature heat ray that completely melts everything, which it unleashes while emitting light from its dorsal plates and the surface of its body.
